stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which option below has the correct order to fit the PAPIs showing?

options.a: (I.) On or close to the approach slope; (II.) above the approach slope.
options.b: (I.) On or close to the approach slope; (II.) below the approach slope.
options.c: (I.) Below the approach slope; (II.) on or close to the approach slope.
options.d: (I.) Above the approach slope; (II.) below the approach slope.
